ogTitle: Grasmere vs Grassy Head: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Grasmere and Grassy Head.
heading: Grasmere vs Grassy Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Grasmere, New South Wales and Grassy Head, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Grasmere has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Grassy Head (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Grasmere or Grassy Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Grasmere has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Grassy Head scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Grasmere scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Grassy Head scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Grasmere or Grassy Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Grasmere has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
